data.title: Lens Chain plans to adopt Aave’s GHO stablecoin as native gas token
data.description:
Both Lens and GHO originate from the developers behind lending protocol Aave, now operating under the Avara umbrella.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340565/lens-chain-plans-to-adopt-aaves-gho-stablecoin-as-native-gas-token?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SEC & CFTC Collaboration: A Game-Changer for U.S. Crypto Regulations?
data.description:

A day after Brain Quintenz was named as the new chairman of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, an interesting report, which indicates the possibility for collaboration between the US Securities and Exchange Commission and the CFTC, has been released. The report,...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/sec-cftc-collaboration-a-game-changer-for-u-s-crypto-regulations/

data.title: Wyoming Highway Patrol Association considers Bitcoin adoption
data.description:
The association joins the “Get Off Zero” initiative and explores the possibility of integrating Bitcoin into its balance sheet, with support from Senator Lummis.
The post Wyoming Highway Patrol Association considers Bitcoin adoption appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/wyoming-highway-patrol-association-considers-bitcoin-adoption/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=wyoming-highway-patrol-association-considers-bitcoin-adoption

data.title: Solana Whale Transfers Significant SOL to Exchange
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a Solana whale has transferred 111,600 SOL, valued at $22.01 million, to a centralized exchange over the past three days. The funds were originally withdrawn from various exchanges in May 2024, totaling 271,331 SOL at an average cost of $182 per SOL. If sold, the whale stands to gain a profit of $1.668 million.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation: 45,000 ETH has been deployed to DeFi protocols, and more will be explored in the future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ethereum Foundation officially stated, "10,000 ETH have been deployed to Spark, 10,000 ETH to Aave Prime, 20,800 ETH to Aave Core, and 4,200 ETH to Compound. More content will be explored in the future, including staking."

data.title: LBank will list DIN (DIN)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch DIN (DIN) at 20:00 (SGT) on February 14, and open the DIN/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 19:00 on February 13, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 19:00 on February 15.

data.title: TRUMP's 24-hour trading volume exceeded US$1.72 billion, and Gate.io's trading volume ranked fourth
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinGecko data shows that TRUMP's intraday increase exceeded 10.8%, and the transaction volume exceeded 1.72 billion US dollars. Among them, Gate.io's transaction volume ranked fourth.

data.title: Coinbase International: PENGU, POPCAT and HNT perpetual contracts are now fully open for trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase International Station announced on the X platform that PENGU, POPCAT and HNT contract markets are now fully open for trading on Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced. Limit, market, stop and stop limit orders are now available.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based IP perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-standard IP perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 20 times. Contract strategy trading will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: LBank will launch TRACY U-based perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank will launch the TRACY U-based perpetual contract at 18:00 (SGT) on February 13, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
